notes.note: Q. Hortensius Hortalus, the leading orator of his generation, here defending Verres; the rivalry with Cicero in this case made Cicero's reputation.
Verres governed Sicily as praetor and pro-praetor 73--71 BC; the prosecution gathered evidence from across the island for nine months in 71/70 BC.

Comperendinatio: the standard two-part trial procedure, prosecution and defence speaking on each. Cicero broke convention here by presenting the evidence rather than a long opening speech, depriving Hortensius of the chance to delay the verdict beyond his consular year.
